title: Medical Image Segmentation
content: Segmentation of skin lesions and classifying them into seven different categories using Deep learning algorithms like UNet, CNN, and customized Unetv2 achieving the highest grade for the project.

title: TinyML Speech Recognition
content: Detection of acoustic vocal sound waves by utilizing advanced edge ai‑based architecture for audio detection with adequate accuracy achieving the highest grade for the project.

title: Covid record management system for public places
content: Developing Covid record management system for maintaining records backed by SQL database, machine learning, and IoT. The system was developed and patented besides achieving the highest grade.

title: Big Data Analytics for Google Play Store
content: Reckoning relevance of google play store apps on numerous features using Big Data Analytics for predicting ratings besides using Explainable AI techniques achieving the highest grade.

title: Financial Stock Recommendation System
content: Created Portfolio Optimization system for asset allocation using deep reinforcement learning algorithms overriding existing financial recommendation system and received maximum grade from college panel members.
